declarations.description: Form-associated Jalali and Gregorian date input web component with typed input editing, calendar popover, min/max validation, custom value formats, Persian digit display, and headless date-input utilities.
declarations.name: JBDateInputWebComponent

attributes.name: value
attributes.description: Date value in the configured value-type and format. As an attribute this must be a string; the JavaScript property also accepts Date or null.

attributes.name: value-type
attributes.description: Controls the canonical .value format returned by the component. It does not control what calendar the user sees.

attributes.name: input-type
attributes.description: Controls the date system used for typing and the calendar UI.

attributes.name: format
attributes.description: Date value string format used for value, min, and max when value-type is GREGORIAN or JALALI.

attributes.name: min
attributes.description: Minimum accepted date. String values must use the configured value-type and format; Date values can be assigned with setMinDate().

attributes.name: max
attributes.description: Maximum accepted date. String values must use the configured value-type and format; Date values can be assigned with setMaxDate().

attributes.name: name
attributes.description: Form field name. The component submits .value through ElementInternals.

attributes.name: label
attributes.description: Label forwarded to the internal jb-input.

attributes.name: message
attributes.description: Helper message forwarded to the internal jb-input.

attributes.name: placeholder
attributes.description: Placeholder shown while the date value is empty.

attributes.name: required
attributes.description: Enables required validation. Empty attribute and 'true' mean true; 'false' or a removed attribute means false.

attributes.name: disabled
attributes.description: Disables the internal input and sets the disabled custom state.

attributes.name: error
attributes.description: External validation error message. When present and non-empty, it is reported as a custom error.

attributes.name: direction
attributes.description: Direction forwarded to the internal calendar.

attributes.name: show-persian-number
attributes.description: Displays Persian digits in the input and calendar while .value remains in English digits.

attributes.name: size
attributes.description: Visual size forwarded to the internal jb-input.

members.name: value
members.description: Canonical submitted value. Setter accepts a formatted string, Date, or null.

members.name: valueInDate
members.description: Current complete value as a JavaScript Date, or null when the date is empty or incomplete.

members.name: inputValue
members.description: Rendered typed input text in YYYY/MM/DD display format.

members.name: inputType
members.description: Date system used by the input UI and calendar.

members.name: valueType
members.description: Date system or timestamp mode used for the canonical .value.

members.name: valueFormat
members.description: Current date value format. Use setFormat() to change it.

members.name: dateRestrictions
members.description: Runtime min and max Date restrictions used by validation and the internal calendar.

type.text: { min: Date | null; max: Date | null }

members.name: validation
members.description: jb-validation helper. Set validation.list for custom validators; validators receive text, inputObject, valueObject, and valueText.

members.name: isAutoValidationDisabled
members.description: Disables automatic component validation when true.

members.name: required
members.description: Enables required validation.

members.name: disabled
members.description: Enables or disables the internal input.

members.name: showPersianNumber
members.description: Displays Persian digits while the canonical .value remains in English digits.

members.name: showCalendar
members.description: Opens or closes the internal calendar popover.

members.name: placeholder
members.description: Placeholder shown while the date value is empty.

members.name: form
members.description: Associated form from ElementInternals.

members.name: name
members.description: Form field name.

members.name: isDirty
members.description: True when current .value differs from initialValue.

members.name: validationMessage
members.description: Current validation message from ElementInternals.

members.name: yearValue
members.description: Year in the configured valueType, or Gregorian year for TIME_STAMP.

members.name: monthValue
members.description: Month in the configured valueType, or Gregorian month for TIME_STAMP.

members.name: dayValue
members.description: Day in the configured valueType, or Gregorian day for TIME_STAMP.

members.name: yearDisplayValue
members.description: Year in the configured inputType used by the visible input and calendar.

members.name: monthDisplayValue
members.description: Month in the configured inputType used by the visible input and calendar.

members.name: dayDisplayValue
members.description: Day in the configured inputType used by the visible input and calendar.

members.name: selectionStart
members.description: Forwarded to the internal jb-input selectionStart.

members.name: selectionEnd
members.description: Forwarded to the internal jb-input selectionEnd.

members.name: selectionDirection
members.description: Forwarded to the internal jb-input selectionDirection.

members.name: elements
members.description: Internal composed elements: input, calendar, popover, and calendarTriggerButton. Use only for advanced integration such as popover overflow configuration.

methods.name: setFormat
methods.description: Sets the date value format used for value, min, and max string parsing.

methods.name: setMinDate
methods.description: Sets or clears the minimum accepted date.

methods.name: setMaxDate
methods.description: Sets or clears the maximum accepted date.

methods.name: setMonthList
methods.description: Overrides month labels for the internal calendar.

methods.name: setCalendarDefaultDateView
methods.description: Sets the year and month shown by the calendar when the input value is empty.

methods.name: getDateValue
methods.description: Returns the current value in the requested value type.

methods.name: focus
methods.description: Focuses the internal input and opens the calendar popover.

methods.name: setSelectionRange
methods.description: Forwards setSelectionRange to the internal jb-input.

methods.name: checkValidity
methods.description: Runs validation without showing the error message and dispatches invalid when invalid.

methods.name: reportValidity
methods.description: Runs validation, shows the first error message, and dispatches invalid when invalid.

methods.name: triggerInputValidation
methods.description: Deprecated. Use validation.checkValidity(), checkValidity(), or reportValidity().

methods.name: clearValidationError
methods.description: Clears the visible validation error and invalid custom state.

events.name: load
events.description: Dispatched from connectedCallback before properties are initialized.

events.name: init
events.description: Dispatched after jb-input, jb-calendar, and jb-popover are defined and the initial value is applied.

events.name: beforeinput
events.description: Cancelable event re-dispatched before the internal typed input value is changed.

events.name: input
events.description: Dispatched after user typing changes the visible input text.

events.name: change
events.description: Dispatched when the committed date value changes after blur or calendar selection. Canceling change reverts the date.

events.name: select
events.description: Dispatched when the user selects a date from the calendar.

events.name: focus
events.description: Re-dispatched when the internal input receives focus.

events.name: blur
events.description: Re-dispatched when the internal input loses focus.

events.name: keydown
events.description: Re-dispatched from the internal input. ArrowUp and ArrowDown change the selected date part.

events.name: keyup
events.description: Re-dispatched from the internal input after the value object is updated from typed text.

events.name: invalid
events.description: Dispatched when checkValidity() or reportValidity() finds an invalid value.

slots.name: inline-start-section
slots.description: Content rendered at the start of the internal jb-input box.

slots.name: inline-end-section
slots.description: Content rendered after the calendar trigger inside the internal jb-input end section.

cssParts.name: popover
cssParts.description: The internal jb-popover that contains the calendar.

cssProperties.name: --jb-date-input-calendar-trigger-display
cssProperties.description: Display value for the calendar trigger.

cssProperties.name: --jb-date-input-calendar-icon-color-active
cssProperties.description: Calendar icon color while the calendar is open.

cssProperties.name: --jb-date-input-popover-z-index
cssProperties.description: Z-index used by the internal calendar popover.

cssStates.name: invalid
cssStates.description: Applied while a validation error is visible.
